mapper.sql: CASE WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND T.SLLR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN T.BYPR_USR_SN WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND T.BYPR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN T.SLLR_USR_SN WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0002' AND T.REQ_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN T.PRV_USR_SN WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0002' AND T.PRV_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN T.REQ_USR_SN END

CASE WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND T.SLLR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN '구매자' WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND T.BYPR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN '판매자' WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0002' AND T.REQ_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN '제공자' WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0002' AND T.PRV_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN '요청자' END
mapper.select: /* 리뷰(임시): 작성 가능한 거래 목록 - TRADE 읽기 전용 조회, 상단 주석 참고 */ SELECT T.TRD_SN AS id, CASE WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' THEN 'goods' ELSE 'service' END AS dealType, AS partyLabel, U.USR_NM AS partyName, CASE WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' THEN P.PRD_NM ELSE S.SVC_REQ_TTL END AS title, DATE_FORMAT(T.TRD_UPDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS completedDate, AS counterpartUsrSn FROM TRADE T LEFT JOIN PRODUCT P ON T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND P.PRD_SN = T.PRD_SN LEFT JOIN SERVICE_REQUEST S ON T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0002' AND S.SVC_REQ_SN = T.SVC_REQ_SN LEFT JOIN USERS U ON U.USR_SN = WHERE T.TRD_STATUS_CD = 'TRDC0006' AND (T.SLLR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} OR T.BYPR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} OR T.REQ_USR_SN = #{usrSn} OR T.PRV_USR_SN = #{usrSn}) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REVIEW R WHERE R.TRD_SN = T.TRD_SN AND R.REVWR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} ) ORDER BY T.TRD_UPDT_DT DESC LIMIT 100

/* 리뷰(임시): 작성 가능 여부 재검증(단건) - TRADE 읽기 전용 조회, 상단 주석 참고 */ SELECT T.TRD_SN AS id, CASE WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' THEN 'goods' ELSE 'service' END AS dealType, AS partyLabel, U.USR_NM AS partyName, CASE WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' THEN P.PRD_NM ELSE S.SVC_REQ_TTL END AS title, DATE_FORMAT(T.TRD_UPDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS completedDate, AS counterpartUsrSn FROM TRADE T LEFT JOIN PRODUCT P ON T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND P.PRD_SN = T.PRD_SN LEFT JOIN SERVICE_REQUEST S ON T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0002' AND S.SVC_REQ_SN = T.SVC_REQ_SN LEFT JOIN USERS U ON U.USR_SN = WHERE T.TRD_SN = #{tradeId} AND T.TRD_STATUS_CD = 'TRDC0006' AND (T.SLLR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} OR T.BYPR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} OR T.REQ_USR_SN = #{usrSn} OR T.PRV_USR_SN = #{usrSn}) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM REVIEW R WHERE R.TRD_SN = T.TRD_SN AND R.REVWR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} )

/* 리뷰: 내가 작성한 리뷰 목록 (TRADE 조인 부분은 임시, 상단 주석 참고) */ SELECT R.RVW_SN AS id, R.TRD_SN AS tradeId, R.RVW_SCORE AS rating, R.RVW_CN AS content, CASE WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' THEN 'goods' ELSE 'service' END AS dealType, CASE WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' THEN P.PRD_NM ELSE S.SVC_REQ_TTL END AS title, CASE WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND T.SLLR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN '구매자' WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND T.BYPR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN '판매자' WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0002' AND T.REQ_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN '제공자' WHEN T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0002' AND T.PRV_USR_SN = #{usrSn} THEN '요청자' END AS partyLabel, U.USR_NM AS partyName, DATE_FORMAT(R.RVW_REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS completedDate FROM REVIEW R JOIN TRADE T ON T.TRD_SN = R.TRD_SN LEFT JOIN PRODUCT P ON T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND P.PRD_SN = T.PRD_SN LEFT JOIN SERVICE_REQUEST S ON T.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0002' AND S.SVC_REQ_SN = T.SVC_REQ_SN JOIN USERS U ON U.USR_SN = R.REVWD_USR_SN WHERE R.REVWR_USR_SN = #{usrSn} ORDER BY R.RVW_REG_DT DESC LIMIT 100
